debug_info.goal:
α : Type
inst✝ : LinearOrder α
pivot : α
l : List α
x : α
⊢ List.count x l = List.count x (smaller α inst✝ pivot l) + List.count x (larger α inst✝ pivot l)

rw [smaller, larger]
  simp [List.count_filter, List.count_filter]
  apply Nat.add_comm

  simp [List.count_filter, List.count_append]
  apply List.sum_map_eq_sum_ite

simp [smaller, larger, List.count_filter_of_mem, List.count_filter_of_not_mem]
  <;> rcases le_or_gt x pivot with h | h <;> simp [h]
